_comment: Model registry for the benchmark. api_type: 'openai' (OpenAI-compatible chat/completions), 'gemini', or 'anthropic'. Keys are read from the env var named in api_key_env (never stored here). Fill in the exact model_id / base_url for the provider you actually use.

llama._note: Served via Groq (OpenAI-compatible). LLAMA_API_KEY holds the Groq key.
